captures.transport_protocol: JSON (Google batchexecute/StreamGenerate chunked-array, protobuf-ish nested JSON; not SSE/WS). Side-loads via /data/batchexecute (rpcids).
captures.success_response_wire_sample: Anti-hijack prefix )]}' then length-prefixed chunks of nested arrays: [["wrb.fr",null,"<escaped-json-string of model response array>"...]] — model text is buried in a stringified inner array. Body NOT readable via Claude-in-Chrome taint-guard; schema is the known BardChatUi StreamGenerate format (length-delimited JSON-protobuf chunks).
captures.frame_separator: Leading byte-length integer line before each JSON chunk (length-prefixed framing), with )]}' XSSI guard prefix at stream start.
captures.dom_render_structure: Custom Angular elements: <chat-app> root > <bard-sidenav-container>/<bard-sidenav-content>. Conversation: user turn = <user-query class='ng-star-inserted'> > <span.user-query-container> > <user-query-content>; model turn = <model-response class='enable-lr26-response-chrome-updates'> > <structured-content-container.model-response-text> > <message-content>. Material components (mat-icon, mat-nav-list, mat-menu, mat-progress-spinner) throughout.
captures.framework: Angular (Google BardChatUi / boq-bard-web; Angular Material). ng-star-inserted markers, custom elements chat-app/model-response/user-query.
captures.console_errors: Not separately polled; visible network 503 only on google-analytics /g/collect beacon (telemetry, non-functional). Chat StreamGenerate + batchexecute all 200.

notes: etap-BYPASSED clean baseline. Chat POST confirmed = StreamGenerate (BardFrontendService), 200. Wire body is length-prefixed protobuf-ish chunked JSON with )]}' XSSI guard — taint-guarded, not byte-readable via Claude-in-Chrome; CDP/HAR needed for raw bytes. Response rendered normally ('안녕하세요! 반가워요...'). Logged in as user 장희.
